title: Regime-Aware Momentum Frozen Reference
hypothesis: A six-name large-cap momentum sleeve with SPY regime gating can earn stock-sleeve promotion through risk-aware participation instead of index mimicry.

eras.label: 2022 Bear Reset
eras.rationale: Stress period for proving the sleeve can defend during broad equity weakness.

eras.label: 2023 Repair
eras.rationale: Checks whether the sleeve re-engages cleanly as leadership broadens off the lows.

eras.label: 2024 Expansion
eras.rationale: Strong momentum tape where the sleeve should participate without excessive churn.

eras.label: 2025-2026 Current Tape
eras.rationale: Current live-era context for the promoted stock sleeve reference.

notes: This is a dashboard-friendly stock reference spec, not a fresh optimization mandate on the frozen training tape.
The actual production-facing stock sleeve is the frozen stop_5_target_15 winner built from the six-name optimized cohort.
Frozen winner reference only; reruns should move the date window forward instead of retuning on the original tape.
Dashboard consumers should treat this as the stock-side canonical bench spec example.

exposure_model.description: Long-only multi-position equity sleeve with capped simultaneous names.

notes: This stock reference spec is designed for dashboard contract parity with crypto, not yet as the source for a bench-spec-native stock runner.
SPY remains the correct benchmark for this broad long-only stock sleeve.

hard_reject_rules.description: Reference contract still expects enough realized trades to be decision-grade.
The stock sleeve should stay within the established drawdown ceiling.

notes: This is a fixed frozen reference, so no plateau rule is needed here.
This file gives the dashboard and bench surfaces a canonical stock-side contract alongside the crypto examples.
Future stock result bundles should snapshot this spec instead of depending on campaign_config.json alone.
